name: skill-provenance
description: Track and maintain provenance for agent skills: source material, attribution, licenses, and change detection.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain provenance sidecars for agent skills
interface.longDescription: A workflow skill for creating and updating skill-source.json provenance sidecars, checking whether upstream sources have changed, and folding external guidance into local skills.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my skills have upstream updates.
Create a skill-source.json sidecar for this skill.
